title: myosotis scorpioides var. praecox
intro: Myosotis scorpioides var. praecox, also known as early forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of early forget-me-not include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Early forget-me-not can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
